member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Graph.GraphBuilder
member.summary: Orchestrates all resolvers to produce the final MvvmGraph.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.Graph.MvvmGraph
member.summary: Immutable in-memory graph produced by GraphBuilder.

member.name: T:MvvmMapper.Core.IFileSystem
member.summary: File system abstraction to keep Core testable without touching real disk.
